hero.title: Data Scientist · Algiers
hero.description: M.Sc. Data Science student with a background in psychology & neuroscience. I build models that sit at the intersection of human behavior and data.

paragraphs: I'm a first-year Data Science master's student based in Algiers, Algeria, with a bachelor's degree in Computer Systems. My background in software engineering shapes how I approach problems — focusing on scalable, data-driven solutions.

I'm currently developing a portfolio of projects at the intersection of data science and web technologies, including predictive modeling, data analysis, and full-stack applications with integrated ML components.
I prioritize hands-on learning, working with real datasets, and understanding the statistical foundations behind each model.
Outside of tech, I design and sew clothes — an activity that reinforces my attention to detail and iterative approach to building systems.

info.value: Machine Learning · Data Analysis · Web Apps

projects.title: Depression Risk Prediction Model
projects.label: Featured · 01
projects.desc: A clinical risk prediction model using the CDC NHANES survey dataset. Combines behavioral, demographic, and physiological variables to predict depression risk scores.

projects.title: Algeria Wildfire Risk Mapping
projects.label: Geospatial
projects.desc: Geospatial wildfire risk model using NASA FIRMS fire detection data. Maps historical patterns across Algerian territory to produce regional risk scores.

projects.title: Sales & Commerce Analytics
projects.label: Commerce
projects.desc: End-to-end sales prediction and customer segmentation pipeline. Purchasing behavior patterns and a forecasting model built on retail data.

contact.blurb: I'm open to internship opportunities, research collaborations, and connecting with people working at the intersection of data, health, and behavior.
